topic.what: Composition security for arithmetic-masked NTT pipelines in PQC hardware
topic.how: Machine-checked Lean 4 proofs establishing per-context uniformity for k-stage pipelines with fresh per-stage masking under ISW first-order probing model
topic.why_matters: No prior proof assistant artifact addressed NTT butterfly composition over Z_q; hardware designers lacked machine-checked evidence for FIPS 140-3 certification of ML-KEM/ML-DSA accelerators

characteristics.what_it_measures: Number of sorry/admit in Lean 4 proof suite
Range of moduli q covered by proofs
characteristics.vs_baseline: Prior work limited to specific moduli (3329, 8380417)
characteristics.evidence: Parameterized by [NeZero q], uses only CommRing structure
ISW first-order probing model; PipelineUniform for t=1
characteristics.context: Higher-order requires independent masks per output pair (not formalized)

characteristics.what_itasures: Type of operations composition applies to
characteristics.vs_baseline: ISW handles nonlinear; this is the simple linear case
characteristics.evidence: Affine structure enables direct proof bypassing full ISW machinery
characteristics.context: Barrett reduction, masked multipliers not covered (future work)

characteristics.evidence: lake build on clean checkout: 0 errors, 0 warnings

good_for: FIPS 140-3 certification documentation for NTT-based PQC accelerators
Formal verification of ML-KEM/ML-DSA hardware designs
Hardware designers verifying fresh masking per stage
Proof engineers citing machine-checked composition theorems

novelty: First machine-checked composition proof for NTT butterfly over Z_q
Named warning: pointwise value-independence is false for butterfly outputs (butterfly_vi_pointwise_false)
r-bearing bridge: extends Paper 3's value-independence to fresh randomness
PipelineUniform: per-context uniformity invariant for k-stage pipelines
Fresh Masking Design Principle with machine-checked formalization
open_problems: Nonlinear arithmetic composition (Barrett PF-PINI(2) in companion paper [3])
Higher-order extension (d >= 2) with independent masks per output pair
Intermediate wire probes (re-masking wires not formalized)
Mathlib Shannon entropy upstreaming for formal MutualInfoZero equivalence
Verified toolchain connecting Theorem 6.2 to QANARY structural dependency analysis
